name: Cemepe Investimentos S.A.
summary: Cemepe Investimentos S.A., through its subsidiaries, manages own and third parties' resources. It also provides technical, financial, and administrative advisory services. The company was formerly known as Companhia Marcopolo de Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes and changed its name to Cemepe Investimentos S.A. in April 1993. Cemepe Investimentos S.A. was founded in 1991 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
